criteria.reason: Preview endpoint checks CRM contract without finance writes.
Preview includes dataset counts, normalized counts, errors and samples.
Raw samples are sanitized and covered by tests.
UI exposes Проверить данные before sync.
Real sync remains explicit and separate.
Tests, compile, eslint and build passed.

commands_run: python3 -m py_compile src/main.py src/core/finance_crm.py src/core/finance_imports.py src/core/finance_kpis.py
cd frontend && npx eslint src/components/FinanceCrmPanel.tsx src/pages/dashboard/SettingsPage.tsx src/pages/dashboard/FinancePage.tsx
